'''shokanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubee|rubee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubee|rubee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shokanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shokanithi|shokanithi]] || [[word:shokaniji|shokaniji]] || [[word:shokanishi|shokanishi]] || [[word:shokaniki|shokaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shokanuthuthu|shokanuthuthu]] || [[word:shokanujuju|shokanujuju]] || [[word:shokanushushu|shokanushushu]] || [[word:shokanukuku|shokanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shokanuthu|shokanuthu]] || [[word:shokanuju|shokanuju]] || [[word:shokanushu|shokanushu]] || [[word:shokanuku|shokanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shokanufthuf|shokanufthuf]] || [[word:shokanufjuf|shokanufjuf]] || [[word:shokanufshuf|shokanufshuf]] || [[word:shokanufkuf|shokanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shokanethe|shokanethe]] || [[word:shokaneje|shokaneje]] || [[word:shokaneshe|shokaneshe]] || [[word:shokaneke|shokaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shokanothotho|shokanothotho]] || [[word:shokanojojo|shokanojojo]] || [[word:shokanoshosho|shokanoshosho]] || [[word:shokanokoko|shokanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shokanotho|shokanotho]] || [[word:shokanojo|shokanojo]] || [[word:shokanosho|shokanosho]] || [[word:shokanoko|shokanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shokanofthof|shokanofthof]] || [[word:shokanofjof|shokanofjof]] || [[word:shokanofshof|shokanofshof]] || [[word:shokanofkof|shokanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shokanïfthïf|shokanïfthïf]] || [[word:shokanïfjïf|shokanïfjïf]] || [[word:shokanïfshïf|shokanïfshïf]] || [[word:shokanïfkïf|shokanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shokanïfthïfthïf|shokanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shokanïfjïfjïf|shokanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shokanïfshïfshïf|shokanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shokanïfkïfkïf|shokanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shokanïfthïf|shokanïfthïf]] || [[word:shokanïfjïf|shokanïfjïf]] || [[word:shokanïfshïf|shokanïfshïf]] || [[word:shokanïfkïf|shokanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shokanïfthïf|shokanïfthïf]] || [[word:shokanïfjïf|shokanïfjïf]] || [[word:shokanïfshïf|shokanïfshïf]] || [[word:shokanïfkïf|shokanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shokanæthæ|shokanæthæ]] || [[word:shokanæjæ|shokanæjæ]] || [[word:shokanæshæ|shokanæshæ]] || [[word:shokanækæ|shokanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shokanathatha|shokanathatha]] || [[word:shokanajaja|shokanajaja]] || [[word:shokanashasha|shokanashasha]] || [[word:shokanakaka|shokanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shokanatha|shokanatha]] || [[word:shokanaja|shokanaja]] || [[word:shokanasha|shokanasha]] || [[word:shokanaka|shokanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shokanafthaf|shokanafthaf]] || [[word:shokanafjaf|shokanafjaf]] || [[word:shokanafshaf|shokanafshaf]] || [[word:shokanafkaf|shokanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shokanasha|shokanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shokanshësha|shokanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shokanrosha|shokanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shokanmusha|shokanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shokanyasha|shokanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshokankshësha|goshokankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshokankrosha|goshokankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshokankmusha|goshokankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshokankyasha|goshokankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shokakanasha|shokakanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shokakanshësha|shokakanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shokakanrosha|shokakanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shokakanmusha|shokakanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shokakanyasha|shokakanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshokakankshësha|goshokakankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshokakankrosha|goshokakankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshokakankmusha|goshokakankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshokakankyasha|goshokakankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shekænasha|shekænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shekænshësha|shekænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shekænrosha|shekænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shekænmusha|shekænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shekænyasha|shekænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshekænkshësha|goshekænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshekænkrosha|goshekænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshekænkmusha|goshekænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshekænkyasha|goshekænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shokfanasha|shokfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shokfanshësha|shokfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shokfanrosha|shokfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shokfanmusha|shokfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shokfanyasha|shokfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshokfankshësha|goshokfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshokfankrosha|goshokfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshokfankmusha|goshokfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshokfankyasha|goshokfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
